firefox.name: DyslexiaAway
firefox.desc: A simple browser extension that applies a dyslexic-friendly font

firefox.name: Web accessibiliy enhanacer
firefox.desc: Enhance web accessibility with text resizing and high contrast mode

firefox.name: Scholar Accessibility Aid
firefox.desc: Dyslexia-friendly font, instant word definitions with pronunciation, and text-to-speech functionality

firefox.name: Dark Reader Accessibility
firefox.desc: Options for users with visual impairments to customize the dark mode experience to better suit their needs

firefox.name: Crossref DOI Accessibility Tool
firefox.desc: Enhances Crossref DOI links for better accessibility with screen readers, providing meaningful link text without altering the visual experience for sighted users

firefox.name: taba11y – Tab order accessibility tester
firefox.desc: Calculates the tab order of all elements and displays it visually, either by drawing a path or by highlighting the elements

firefox.name: Accessibility Helper
firefox.desc: Provides color blindnEnhanced Web Accessibility for Everyoneess correction, text resizing, high contrast mode, and text-to-speech features

chromium.name: Dyslens
chromium.desc: Dyslens is a open source chrome extension, built and designed to make web more accessible
